calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Fred Keeperman, Esq. for Plaintiff: The National Collection Agency Inc.
Plaintiff's witness: Bill Scott, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: United Colocation Group, Inc., A Corporation as follows:
Damages $120328.84
Prejudgment Interest $3,801.90
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $392.50 for a total of $127,348.24
Judgment signed in open court.
